name: ebenova-vigil-fraud-alert
description: Proximity-based card fraud detection and authorization engine. Authorize transactions using GPS proximity, manage travel plans, block cards, analyze risk profiles, and get AI-generated fraud investigation reports.

tools.name: vigil_authorize
tools.description: Authorize a transaction using GPS proximity and card mode

tools.name: vigil_get_card
tools.description: Get card details, GPS status, and current mode

tools.name: vigil_update_card_mode
tools.description: Set card mode: home, travel, or lockdown

tools.name: vigil_update_gps
tools.description: Update the GPS location for a card

tools.name: vigil_add_travel_plan
tools.description: Add a travel plan to allow foreign transactions

tools.name: vigil_list_transactions
tools.description: List recent transactions with authorization results

tools.name: vigil_list_alerts
tools.description: List fraud alerts for a card

tools.name: vigil_update_alert
tools.description: Acknowledge, dismiss, or escalate a fraud alert

tools.name: vigil_get_risk_profile
tools.description: Get the risk score and profile for a card

tools.name: vigil_analyze_transaction
tools.description: AI-powered fraud analysis for a specific transaction

tools.name: vigil_block_transaction
tools.description: AI-powered decision to block a suspicious transaction

tools.name: vigil_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a full fraud investigation report for a card
